final:
module sata_controller (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] command_out
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (data_in == 4'b1010) // 0xA in binary
            command_out = ~data_in; // Invert the data_in
        else
            command_out = data_in; // Pass the data_in unchanged
    end
endmodule
